title: GH #16: reviews candidate add auto-fills cells from the feature's capped cells
action: handleReviewsCandidateAdd: when --cells is omitted, auto-fill from listCells(root) filtered to the feature's capped cells. Fixes coverage-derivation: sessionCoversCandidate matches by feature-entry OR cell-set; a cells-less candidate whose session included the work by CELL could never match -> stuck 'unreviewed' despite an approved session (GitHub #16). Registry description updated.

truths: candidate add with no --cells auto-fills the feature's CAPPED cells (not open, not other features).
artifacts: Full 21-suite verify green; test_bee_cli auto-fill test.
prohibitions: Do NOT change the coverage-derivation logic itself; only fill candidate.cells at add-time.

trace.verification_evidence:
Before (GH #16): `bee reviews candidate add --feature F --head H --mode M` stored cells:[] when --cells omitted. sessionCoversCandidate matches by feature-entry OR by cell-subset; a session that included the work by CELL + a cells-less candidate => no match => the feature stayed "unreviewed" in reviews status even after the session approved it (5 features affected in the reporter's daily batch). The review record itself was correct — display/coverage-derivation only.
After: the handler auto-fills cells from listCells(root) filtered to the feature's CAPPED cells when --cells is omitted; explicit --cells still wins.
Evidence: test_bee_cli 146/0 — new test seeds a capped cell (revfeat-1), an open cell (revfeat-2), and a capped cell of another feature (other-1), then `candidate add --feature revfeat` with no --cells => entry.cells === ['revfeat-1'] (capped-of-this-feature only). Full 21-suite foreground CHAIN_EXIT:0; mirrors byte-identical.
trace.verify_output: test_bee_cli 146/0 incl the #16 auto-fill test (cells-less candidate add fills only the feature's capped cell, not open/other-feature); full 21-suite foreground CHAIN_EXIT:0.
